title: HR and Payroll Outsourcing Services in Vietnam
metaDescription: Simplify and maintain compliance with HR and payroll outsourcing in Vietnam, including recruitment, payroll, insurance, and personal income tax.

hero.title: HR and Payroll Outsourcing Services in Vietnam
hero.subtitle: WTP Advisory offers HR & Payroll Services, simplifying and ensuring compliance in all HR aspects in Vietnam, including recruitment, payroll, insurance, and personal income taxes. Overcome workforce management challenges with a trusted partner who puts your needs first.

sections.heading: Types of Vietnam Increased Insurance Payment Caps

rows.label: Maximum cap of Accident & Occupational Disease Insurance
Eligibility for 100% coverage of medical expenses (after paying 5 consecutive years of health insurance)

items.title: Initial Labor Declaration
items.desc: Streamline employee onboarding and ensure adherence to labor regulations. Develop fair and appealing salary structures to attract and retain talent with salary scaling strategies. Includes Initial Labor Report submission (required for every company with employees), Company Regulation registered with the local authorities if 10 or more employees are registered, and Salary scale set up with detailed information for each position and level.

items.title: Initial Social Insurance Declaration
items.desc: We streamline document management, ensure precise insurance handling, maintain comprehensive employee records, and efficiently monitor your workforce. Includes delivering the documents sheet listing company and related people details, participating in and adjusting the Declaration sheet on Social, Health and Unemployment Insurance for each employee, and creating the Employee Information and Company Labor List.

sections.heading: HR, Payroll, Insurance and PIT Processing & Reporting

items.title: Initial Labor
items.desc: Whether you're an HR-registered client or not, we collect vital data, including contracts and employee information, and prepare essential payroll documents to streamline your operations. For new clients we also collect company information covering mandatory reports, SHUI, PIT and Trade Union current status.

items.title: Payroll Tasks
items.desc: We handle comprehensive payroll calculations, covering Gross to Net/Net to Gross, Personal Income Tax, insurance, severance allowances, and bonuses, based on your timesheet, annual leave and basic employee information reports, while also generating the required payroll documents and reports.

items.title: Social, Health & Unemployment Insurance (SHUI)
items.desc: WTP Advisory handle a wide range of SHUI Authority compliance tasks, from monthly reports, maternity and sick leave claims, to labor accidents. We also manage health insurance cards and payment requests for seamless operations, including increase/decrease/changes reports, SI book closing, reconciliation of SHUI contributions and payment requests sent to the accountant.

items.title: Personal Income Tax (PIT)
items.desc: We will efficiently prepare and submit monthly/quarterly personal income tax declarations, both online and in hard copy, based on accurate payroll data. WTP Advisory also handle the lodgement of PIT reports with the Tax Department.

items.title: Year-end PIT Tax Finalization & Book
items.desc: Yearly PIT Finalization is for your business with employees working a full calendar year with one income source. WTP Advisory issue income confirmations and tax receipts.

items.title: Labor Reports
items.desc: We prepare and submit the periodic labor reports required by the local authorities, including the half-yearly and annual labor usage reports, keeping your company compliant with labor reporting obligations throughout the year.

items.title: Register the Personal Income Tax Code for New Hire (Local) or Dependants
items.desc: Our team will register personal income tax codes for new local hires and dependents, provide consultation on required documents, and submit dependent declarations online.

items.title: HR Operation Supporting
items.desc: Discover our HR Operation Support services, simplifying compliance and documentation, so you can focus on your business while we manage HR operations, including preparing checklists, collecting and filing offer letters, labor contracts, decisions and dependant documentation per labor law.

items.title: Submit Your Information & Needs

sections.heading: Frequently Asked Questions on HR and Payroll Outsourcing

items.q: Do I need a legal entity in Vietnam to hire employees?
items.a: You can recruit both local and foreign employees in Vietnam for your company without establishing a legal entity. Common ways to do this include using recruitment technology platforms, employer of record (EOR) providers, or direct hiring through various communication channels such as LinkedIn and Facebook.

items.q: Can I pay my employees from abroad as a foreign employer?
items.a: You can set up your payroll and payroll compliance entirely remotely. As legal obligations, you have to submit all paperwork for employee declaration and salary payment to relevant authorities (namely the Department or Ministry of Labour, Invalids and Social Affairs).

items.q: What are all the services included in the HR and payroll outsourcing package?
items.a: When applying for our comprehensive HR outsourcing services, you have the option of choosing one of, some of, or all of the following services: HR initial establishment, payroll processing, SHUI compliance, personal income tax declaration and finalization, labor reports, PIT code registration, and HR operation support.

items.title: Incorporation
